questionHtml:
What is produced by type II pneumocytes?

A. Epinephrine

B. Elastase

C. Pulmonary surfactant

D. Alpha 1-antitrypsin

meta.title: What is produced by type II pneumocytes? A. Epinephrine B. Elastase C. Pulmonary surfactant D. Alpha 1-antitrypsin
